name: Galymzhan Yessimbek
title: AI / LLM Engineer · Full-stack Developer · Creative Technologist
summary: I build AI-powered systems, interactive data experiences and full-stack products at the intersection of technology, finance and creative engineering. My background combines Cyberphysics, Financial Analytics, backend/API development, RAG systems, local LLM experiments and interactive frontend products.
highlights: Built PBI Monitor: a working desktop/internal automation tool for daily Power BI dashboard refresh checks and business analytics workflows.
Built a local-LLM/RAG concept for a Telegram-based company knowledge assistant using Ollama, ChromaDB, PostgreSQL and Python.
Delivered FinCat: a full-stack financial organizations catalog with Django REST Framework, Nuxt 3, JWT auth, roles, CRUD and Dockerized PostgreSQL.
Built AbafarConvertor: a YouTube-to-MP3 utility with Node/Express backend and Expo/React Native client structure.
Completed CBDC research using OLS regression, econometrics and macroeconomic indicators with Digital Tenge context.
Research focus: Central Bank Digital Currency and macroeconomic indicators.
Methods: OLS regression, econometrics, scenario analysis, Python-based analytics.
Technical foundation across programming, data, physics and analytical modeling.
Relevant areas: machine learning, artificial intelligence, big data and computational thinking.
Built a React-based educational game/product as a diploma project.
Focused on frontend architecture, backend integration and product implementation.

research.title: Central Bank Digital Currency and Macroeconomic Indicators
research.description: Master research around CBDC issuance, Digital Tenge context and potential macroeconomic effects using econometric analysis and scenario thinking.
